{{Quote|They came to our land demanding our livelihood, but Ilsa, my Ilsa, said no...|[[Jon (farmer)|Jon]], on his daughter's last moments|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />}}
'''Ilsa''' was the daughter of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] [[Farmer/Legends|farmer]] [[Jon (farmer)|Jon]].

==Biography==
In [[3956 BBY]], she was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]]. Her father called upon the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to seek revenge for his daughter's murder, and the call was answered by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], at that time studying as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] under his programmed identity. Revan helped avenge her [[Death/Legends|death]] by [[Confrontation on Dantooine|killing]] all Mandalorians in the area, and their [[Sherruk|leader]].
